summary: Verified Discord approval invite-link feature and admin button-driven approval flow via source inspection + REST end-to-end. All previously-passing endpoints still work, bot is online, frontend Department Structure renders all 14 ranks.
passed: POST /api/applications returns ref_number PB-AP-XXXXXX and status=pending (got PB-AP-9AA4B5)
POST /api/admin/applications/{id}/decision with decision=approved sets status=approved and decided_at
Source inspection /app/backend/server.py: discord.ui.View + Button with custom_id 'app_approve:{aid}' (line 399) and 'app_reject:{aid}' (line 401) confirmed
Source inspection: on_interaction handler (lines 103-141) toggles status approved/rejected, persists decided_at + decided_by_discord, edits message, DMs applicant

Source inspection: Approval DM embed description contains conditional `🔗 Join our Discord: {invite}` snippet when settings.discord_invite is set (line 128 in on_interaction; line 470 in decide_application)
POST /api/auth/login returns admin user with httpOnly cookie
Frontend home page renders all 14 Department Structure ranks (structure-rank-1 through structure-rank-14)
notes: Could not click real Discord buttons (no Discord traffic interception possible). Code paths verified by source inspection per request. discord_bot_token in settings not touched.
